hero.title: Earn Income with Real Estate
hero.subtitle: Start investing from $250
hero.description: Invest fractionally in high-yield properties, professionally managed through purchase, rental, & sale.

mission.title: Simplifying Global Real Estate Investment
mission.description: InReal was founded to break down the barriers to international property ownership. We provide a secure, transparent, and fully managed platform that empowers anyone to build a global real estate portfolio, starting with just $250. Our goal is to make wealth-building through property accessible to everyone, everywhere.

invest.title: Invest
invest.description: Browse curated properties and purchase shares securely in minutes.

earn.title: Earn
earn.description: Receive passive income from rental yields and property appreciation.

exit.title: Exit
exit.description: Sell your shares on our secondary market or benefit from the property sale.

q1.question: What is fractional real estate investment?
q1.answer: Fractional real estate investment allows you to own a portion of a property rather than the entire property. With InReal, you can invest as little as $500 to own shares in premium real estate, making it accessible to everyone.

q2.question: How does the SPV structure protect my investment?
q2.answer: Each property is held in a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV), a legal entity created specifically for that property. This structure provides legal protection, separates the property from other assets, and ensures clear ownership rights for all investors.

q3.question: When and how do I receive returns?
q3.answer: Returns are distributed on a scheduled basis, typically quarterly. You receive both rental income distributions and potential appreciation when the property is sold. All distributions are made directly to your account.

q4.question: Can I sell my shares?
q4.answer: Yes, InReal provides a secondary market where you can list your shares for sale to other investors. While not as liquid as stocks, this provides an exit option before the property is sold.

q5.question: What are the risks involved?
q5.answer: Like all investments, real estate carries risks including market fluctuations, property value changes, and rental income variability. However, our curated selection process, professional management, and diversification options help mitigate these risks.

q6.question: How are properties selected?
q6.answer: Our expert team conducts thorough due diligence on every property, analyzing location, market trends, rental potential, and growth prospects. Only properties meeting our strict criteria are offered to investors.

footer.disclaimer: Investment involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
